S.FORM: == Molahad no fu'is == Protostar Main-sequence Cinganganay a fu'is Algol (B8V ato K0IV ato F1V) Alpha Centauri (G2V ato K1V) Betelgeuse (M1-M2 Ia-ab) Cidal (G2V) Deneb (A2Ia) Eta Carinae (LBVs ato O) Gliese 581 (M3V) R136a1 (WN5h) Rigel (B8Ia ato tosa a B9V)
S.PHON: == mo~uɾaħaɬ~ɮ no~u fo~u~uʡis == pro~uto~ustar main-sə*o~u~uənʦə ʦiŋaŋanaj a fo~u~uʡis aɾ*o~uɾ (b~b~v*b~v ato~u k*ib~v ato~u f*b~v) aɾpħa ʦəntao~u~uri (**b~v ato~u k*b~v) b~b~vətəɾ*əo~u~usə (m*-m* ia-ab~b~v) ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ (**b~v) ɬ~ɮənəb~b~v (a*ia) əta ʦarinaə (ɾb~b~vb~vs ato~u o~u) *ɾiəsə *** (m*b~v) r***a* (wn*ħ) ri*əɾ (b~b~v*ia ato~u to~usa a b~b~v*b~v)
S.FORM: == Molahad no fu'is == Protostar Main-sequence Cinganganay a fu'is Algol (B8V ato K0IV ato F1V) Alpha Centauri (G2V ato K1V) Betelgeuse (M1-M2 Ia-ab) Cidal (G2V) Deneb (A2Ia) Eta Carinae (LBVs ato O) Gliese 581 (M3V) R136a1 (WN5h) Rigel (B8Ia ato tosa a B9V)
